source_metadata.title_raw: Judge Redmon - A-82-024 - February 2, 1982 - Shasta County

content.full_text:
({bambers of tbe ~uperior ((ourt 
&f)asta (lCount!' 
JOSEPH H. REDMON, JUDGE 
1ltbbtng, I!alifornta 
February 9, 1982 
Fair Political Practices Commission 
P. O. Box 807 
Sacramento, CA 
95804 
Attention: 
Ms. Alice Hughes 
Legal Documents Examiner 
Dear Ms. Hughes: 
Thank you for talking to me today. 
The three investments that I currently have under 
the State of California Deferred Compensation Plan are 
Great Western Savings, T. Rowe Price Growth Fund, and 
the Rowe Price Net Income Fund. 
If you wish additional information concerning the 
State of California Deferred Compensation Plan, I would 
suggest you contact the Department of General Services, 
926 J Street, Sacramento, CA 
95814. 
It would be appreciated if you could advise as to 
whether these investments are of a nature that must be 
reported in my Statement of Economi- Interests, Form 
721. 
JHR:kc 
J 
J 
Superior Court

sections.question: It would be appreciated if you could advise as to whether these investments are of a nature that must be reported in my Statement of Economic Interests, Form 721.
sections.question_synthetic: A California Superior Court judge seeks guidance on whether three specific investments held under the State Deferred Compensation Plan (Great Western Savings, T. Rowe Price Growth Fund, and T. Rowe Price Net Income Fund) must be reported on Form 721, the Statement of Economic Interests.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request/inquiry letter from a public official to FPPC, not an FPPC response letter. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections are present. Document is dated February 9, 1982 and references Document ID A-82-024. The actual question is embedded in the closing paragraph.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: It would be appreciated if you could advise as to whether these investments are of a nature that must be reported in my Statement of Economic Interests, Form 721.

embedding.summary: Judge Joseph H. Redmon writes to the FPPC requesting advice on whether three investments held under the State of California Deferred Compensation Plan require reporting on Form 721 (Statement of Economic Interests).
